title: erythrocoma arizonica
intro: Erythrocoma arizonica, also known as the Arizona globemallow, is a flowering plant in the mallow family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The Arizona globemallow has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support wound healing. The Arizona globemallow can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat various skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
